Naive.label: Naive
Naive.description: GO term frequencies from the training set assigned to all proteins

FunBind.label: FunBind
FunBind.description: Multi-modality based model combining sequence, structure, domains, and textual descriptions

ProtT5.label: ProtT5
ProtT5.description: ProtT5 embedding-based annotation transfer from training set proteins

TransFew.label: TransFew
TransFew.description: ESM-2-based pipeline combinining representations of both protein sequences and GO terms

BLAST.label: BLAST
BLAST.description: Homology-based GO annotation transfer from training set proteins

GOA Non-exp.label: GOA Non-exp
GOA Non-exp.description: Non-experimental GO annotations from UniProt-GOA training set

DeepGOPlus.label: DeepGOPlus
DeepGOPlus.description: Deep neural network and sequence similarity-based predictions

subsets.NK: No Knowledge - targets with no prior experimental annotations
subsets.LK: Limited Knowledge - targets with some prior experimental annotations
subsets.PK: Prior Knowledge - targets with prior experimental annotations
